name: Apple-Pecan Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/4 cup butter in a skillet. Add onion and celery and cook until tender.
2. Add the bread to the skillet. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in the skillet.
3. Stir in apples and cook until golden.
4. Add the apples to the bread mixture. Mix in salt, pepper, sage, marjoram, thyme, parsley, and pecans.
5. Add water and mix thoroughly. Makes enough for a 10-pound turkey.
